import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)

mut d = 0
while d <= 9
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
    if b == d + 48
      count = count + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut hashes = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < count
    hashes = "#{hashes}#"
    j = j + 1
  end
  println("#{d}: #{hashes}")
  d = d + 1
end
